summary: Phase 7 detailed execution plan — Marketing Website + Polish. Covers the landing page design (hero section with animated GPU particle visualization, 3 feature cards, how-it-works 4-step diagram, pricing calculator, testimonials, CTA), pricing page (interactive GPU selector with live comparison table), about page, documentation pages, Framer Motion animation strategy (intersection observer reveals, staggered children, counter animations), E2E testing plan (5 critical scenarios including fault tolerance demo), performance benchmarking (scheduler latency, pipeline throughput, 50-node simulation), documentation deliverables, Sentry integration, and SEO/meta tag strategy.
